issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' but the condition logic is wrong. This is an optional self-trash effect, not checking board state.
Condition 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Blackbeard Pirates' is incorrect. Should check if Leader has {Blackbeard Pirates} type using 'LeaderHasType' condition, not board presence.

Action 'TrashFromHand' is wrong. Should trash THIS CHARACTER (self), not from hand. Also missing the secondary action: give opponent's Character −1 cost. This effect requires conditional trash-then-powerBoost chain.
Missing the PowerBoost action targeting opponent's Character with −1 cost during this turn. Needs duration 'DuringYourTurn' because text says 'during this turn'.
